description:
Advances: specled.compiler_tracer

Deliverable:
Rework SpecLedEx.Compiler.Tracer.flush per refined-plan D1-D4/D8 (see epic's Refined plan path, and .spec/decisions/specled.decision.tracer_manifest_merge_on_flush.md):
- Second named public ETS meta table :specled_compiler_tracer_meta (same heir strategy). Rows: {:session_module, m} inserted at each :on_module BEFORE merge computation (a recompiled module with zero remote calls must still drop stale entries); {:merge_base, map} seeded once per session via :ets.insert_new (losers re-lookup) with tolerant file read (missing/corrupt -> %{}) and seed-time prune against the on-disk compile manifest (Manifest.load(Path.join(Mix.Project.manifest_path(), "compile.elixir")) in try/rescue; SKIP prune when loaded manifest is empty — cold build must not wipe the base).
- Flush = merge_base minus entries whose caller module is in the session set, union session edges, callee lists sorted+deduped (D8), written atomically via unique temp file + File.rename (D3). Stale-last-write race between parallel flushes explicitly accepted, documented in moduledoc.
- Pure @doc false helpers: merge_edges(previous, session_modules, session_edges) and prune_edges(edges, live_modules) (no-op when live_modules nil/empty).
- @doc false reset/0 clearing both tables; tracer_test setup switches to it.
- Moduledoc rework: merge semantics, meta table, atomicity, accepted race, prune lag.
- LOC: if formatted tracer.ex exceeds the 300-LOC cap, factor pure helpers into lib/specled_ex/compiler/tracer/manifest_merge.ex (public surface stays on Tracer) and refine specled.compiler_tracer.single_file_cap statement in this stage.
- Spec .spec/specs/compiler_tracer.spec.md in this stage: REFINE captures_remote_calls (id+priority preserved; on_module persists by merging with on-disk manifest, not replacing); ADD requirement specled.compiler_tracer.merge_on_flush (must); ADD scenarios incremental_equals_force, recompiled_module_replaces_edges, ghost_module_pruned (documents one-compile lag); ADD tagged_tests verification block covering merge_on_flush, execute: true; add test/integration/tracer_incremental_merge_test.exs to surface.

Verification:
- Tests to pass: mix test test/specled_ex/compiler/tracer_test.exs test/integration/tracer_incremental_merge_test.exs; full mix test; mix spec.check
- Behaviors to demonstrate: scenario incremental_equals_force (3-module tmp project A->B->C: full compile -> ETF1; content-edit b.ex (touch does NOT recompile on checksum Mix) -> incremental -> ETF2; rm -rf _build -> force -> ETF3; assert ETF2 == ETF3 exact map equality); scenario recompiled_module_replaces_edges (seed ETF with entries for two real host modules, reset, fire :on_module for one with zero captured edges -> its entries dropped, other preserved); scenario ghost_module_pruned (fabricated module entry absent after flush; only FINAL state asserted after second compile — lag state is implementation freedom). Unit + stream_data property tests for merge_edges/prune_edges: non-session entries preserved, session-caller entries only from session edges, idempotence. New @tag spec: annotations required (test_tags enforcement=error).

Out of Scope (files):
- lib/specled_ex/realization/** (S2 owns implementation.ex)
- lib/specled_ex/compiler/context.ex, lib/mix/tasks/** (S3)
- .spec/specs/implementation_tier.spec.md, .spec/specs/compiler_context.spec.md, .spec/specs/mix_tasks.spec.md
- CHANGELOG.md, mix.exs
Allowed touches (this stage may modify):
- lib/specled_ex/compiler/tracer.ex
- lib/specled_ex/compiler/tracer/manifest_merge.ex (create only if 300-LOC cap exceeded)
- .spec/specs/compiler_tracer.spec.md
- test/specled_ex/compiler/tracer_test.exs
- test/integration/tracer_incremental_merge_test.exs

Out of Scope (intent):
- No changes to how the manifest is READ (that is S2) — only how it is written.
- No fix for same-VM multi-compile staleness (D9a, explicitly accepted).
- No file locking; do not 'fix' the stale-last-write race.
- Existing tracer_test assertions keep passing (merge is a superset of replace for a fresh build).
- Save/restore the real _build/test/.spec/xref_mfa.etf around file-mutating tests (on_exit).

Merge gate:
- [ ] mix compile --warnings-as-errors
- [ ] mix test (incl. new integration test, no exclusions)
- [ ] mix format --check-formatted && mix deps.unlock --check-unused
- [ ] mix spec.check
- [ ] Scope check: diff touches only Allowed globs (mechanical)
- [ ] Auditor APPROVE comment on the ticket
title: S1: Tracer merge-on-flush, seed-time prune, atomic writes
